entries.error_message: SyntaxError: Export named 'getAffectedFiles' not found in module 'script/omo-diff.ts'
entries.diagnosis: API change: getAffectedFiles was renamed to findAffectedFiles and categorizeChange was not exported after omo-diff.ts refactor to dynamic scanning with ScannedComponent types
